Hey! How can I help you today? I can assist with coding, debugging, exploring files, writing, data analysis, or running commands in your workspace.I see README.md selected. What would you like me to do with it?
- Summarize or explain it
- Review for clarity/structure and suggest improvements
- Fix formatting/grammar
- Add sections (install, usage, examples, badges, TOC, license, contributing)
- Generate a polished README template based on your project

If you want me to review the actual content, please let me open it or paste it here.
